# Radio
<!-- nib-component: v1 | generated: 2026-03-01 | do not edit manually -->

> A single option within a radio group — only one option can be selected at a time

**Widget type:** `radio`
**WAI-ARIA APG:** [radio pattern](https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/patterns/radio/)

---

## Anatomy

| Part | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `root` | The outer wrapper for the radio group |
| `radio` | The individual radio button control |
| `label` | The visible text label for the radio option |
| `indicator` | The filled circle shown when selected |

---

## States

| State | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| `default` | Unselected resting state |
| `selected` | Option is the current selection |
| `focused` | Keyboard or programmatic focus (focus ring) |
| `disabled` | Not interactive (aria-disabled) |
| `selected-disabled` | Selected and non-interactive (aria-disabled) |

---

## Variants

- `default` — Standard radio button
- `card` — Full-card clickable radio option
## Accessibility

**ARIA role:** `radio`
**Focus behavior:** roving-tabindex
**Focus trap:** No
**Required label:** Yes (visible-label-or-aria-labelledby)
**Touch target minimum:** 44pt iOS / 48dp Android / 24px web

### Keyboard Interaction

| Key | Behavior |
|-----|----------|
| `ArrowDown` | Move focus to and select the next radio option |
| `ArrowRight` | Move focus to and select the next radio option |
| `ArrowUp` | Move focus to and select the previous radio option |
| `ArrowLeft` | Move focus to and select the previous radio option |
| `Space` | Selects the focused radio option if not already selected |
| `Tab` | Move focus to the selected (or first) radio in the group |

### ARIA Attributes

- `aria-checked`
- `aria-label`
- `aria-labelledby`
- `aria-disabled`

---

## Token Bindings

```json
{
  "radio": {
    "default": {
      "background": "radio.bg",
      "border-color": "radio.border",
      "border-radius": "radio.radius"
    },
    "selected": {
      "background": "radio.bg.selected",
      "border-color": "radio.border.selected"
    },
    "focused": {
      "outline-color": "color.focus.ring",
      "outline-width": "2px"
    },
    "disabled": {
      "background": "color.surface.disabled",
      "border-color": "color.border.disabled"
    }
  }
}
```
